title: Purchase Orders
description: Commercial agreements with vendors for the purchasing of commodities.

createdBy.title: Created By
createdBy.description: The name of the originator (user or system) of the data. This is informational only, do not use in business logic!

createdOn.title: Created On
createdOn.description: The date and time when the entity instance was created

modifiedBy.title: Modified By
modifiedBy.description: The name of the modifier (user or system) of the data. This is informational only, do not use in business logic!

modifiedOn.title: Modified On
modifiedOn.description: The date and time when the entity instance was last modified

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier of the purchase order.

type.title: Type
type.description: The type of purchase order, i.e. Procurement, eProcurement, or Travel.

description.title: Description
description.description: The description of the purchase order.

orderNumber.title: Order Number
orderNumber.description: The order number generated by the finance system.

referenceNumbers.title: Reference Numbers
referenceNumbers.description: A reference number which represents the originating system's source document.

paymentSource.title: Payment Source
paymentSource.description: The source account for the purchase order

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Payment Source.

orderedOn.title: Ordered On
orderedOn.description: The date the purchase order was created.

transactionDate.title: Transaction Date
transactionDate.description: The transaction date for the purchase order. This will be the date used when entering the transactions into the general ledger.

deliveredBy.title: Delivered By
deliveredBy.description: The expected delivery date for the purchase order.

status.title: Status
status.description: The status of the purchase order.

statusDate.title: Status Date
statusDate.description: The date associated with the purchase order's status.

buyer.title: Buyer
buyer.description: The buyer associated with the purchase order.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Buyer.

initiator.title: Initiator
initiator.description: The initiator of the purchase order.

detail.title: Detail
detail.description: The details of the person who initiated the purchase order.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Detail.

email.title: Email
email.description: The email address associated with the initiator.

phone.title: Phone
phone.description: The phone number of the initiator.

number.title: Number
number.description: The number assigned to the phone.

extension.title: Extension
extension.description: The extension used to connect to the phone when multiple phones share the same primary number.

fax.title: Fax
fax.description: The fax number of the initiator.

number.title: Number
number.description: The number assigned to the fax machine.

extension.title: Extension
extension.description: The extension used to connect to the fax machine when multiple fax machines share the same primary number.

shipping.title: Shipping
shipping.description: The shipping information associated with the purchase order.

attention.title: Attention
attention.description: The person or office to which the shipment is directed.

shipTo.title: Ship To
shipTo.description: The destination to which the items should be shipped.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Ship To.

freeOnBoard.title: Free On Board
freeOnBoard.description: The free on board (FOB) type specified for the purchase order.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Free On Board.

overrideShippingDestination.title: Override Shipping Destination
overrideShippingDestination.description: Override of the shipping information specified in the ship to destination.

description.title: Description
description.description: The description of the shipping destination.

addressLines.title: Address Lines
addressLines.description: The address lines of the destination's location, such as a street address or post office box number, city, region, and postal code.

place.title: Place
place.description: A country specific postal region. Postal regions are expressed as a hierarchy of country, region, and sub-region, and as a locality with postal automation codes.

country.title: Country
country.description: The country specific postal region definition.

oneOf.title: Australia
oneOf.description: The postal region definition for Australia.

code.title: Code
code.description: The ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code for Australia.

title.title: Country
title.description: The name of the country, as used in everyday speech.

postalTitle.title: Postal Country
postalTitle.description: The name of the country when mail is being addressed from an international sender.

code.title: Code
code.description: The ISO 3166-2 code used to identify the region within the country.

title.title: Title
title.description: The full name of the region

subRegion.title: Subregion
subRegion.description: A subregion within the country and region

code.title: Code
code.description: A code that may be used to identify the sub-region. This should be the ISO 3166-2 code, if one exists, otherwise, a user defined code may be optionally specified.

title.title: Title
title.description: The name of a subregion

locality.title: city

deliveryPoint.title: Delivery Point
deliveryPoint.description: A specific set of digits between 00 and 99 assigned to every address. When combined with the ZIP + 4 code, the delivery point provides a unique identifier for every deliverable address served by the US Postal Service.

carrierRoute.title: Carrier Route
carrierRoute.description: A subdivision of a US zipcode.

correctionDigit.title: Correction Digit
correctionDigit.description: A number used to check for errors in a US ZIP code, delivery point, or carrier route.

email.title: Email
email.description: The email address of the contact.

paymentTerms.title: Payment Terms
paymentTerms.description: The vendor payment terms and conditions that are applicable to the purchase order.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Payment Terms.

classification.title: Classification
classification.description: A user defined classification of the purchase order.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Classification.

submittedBy.title: Submitted By
submittedBy.description: The person who made the submit request for the purchase order.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Submitted By.

comments.title: Comments
comments.description: The comments associated with the purchase order.

comment.title: Comment
comment.description: A comment associated with the purchase order.

type.title: Type
type.description: An indication of whether the comment is printed or not printed.

lineItems.title: Line Items
lineItems.description: The line items associated with the purchase order.

lineItemNumber.title: Line Item Number
lineItemNumber.description: A system generated number to identify the line item. User specified values will be overwritten.

description.title: Description
description.description: The description of the commodity specified by the line item.

commodityCode.title: Commodity Code
commodityCode.description: The commodity code associated with the line item.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Commodity Code.

partNumber.title: Part Number
partNumber.description: The vendor part number for the line item.

desiredDate.title: Desired Date
desiredDate.description: The date when the item specified for the line item is needed.

quantity.title: Quantity
quantity.description: The quantity of the line item.

unitOfMeasure.title: Unit Of Measure
unitOfMeasure.description: The unit of measure used for the line item.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Unit Of Measure.

unitPrice.title: Unit Price
unitPrice.description: The price per unit for the commodity specified for the line item.

additionalAmount.title: Additional Amount
additionalAmount.description: Additional charges/discounts applied to the line item (e.g. freight).

taxCodes.title: Tax Codes
taxCodes.description: The tax codes applicable to the line item.

items.title: Tax Codes
items.description: The tax codes applicable to the line item.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Tax Codes.

discountAmount.title: Discount Amount
discountAmount.description: The discount amount applied to the line item, which may be calculated from the overall discount or overridden.

tradeDiscount.title: Trade Discount
tradeDiscount.description: A discount applied to the line item in addition to the overall vendor discount, e.g. discount based on quantity purchased.

oneOf.title: Amount
oneOf.description: The amount of the discount.

oneOf.title: percent
oneOf.description: The percentage of the discount.

comments.title: Comments
comments.description: The comments associated with the line item.

comment.title: Comment
comment.description: A comment associated with the line item.

type.title: Type
type.description: An indication of whether the comment is printed or not printed.

reference.title: Reference
reference.description: The reference associated with the line item.

document.title: Document
document.description: The reference document associated with the line item.

oneOf.title: Purchasing Arrangement
oneOf.description: The purchasing arrangement associated with the line item.

purchasingArrangement.title: Purchasing Arrangement
purchasingArrangement.description: The purchasing arrangement associated with the line item.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Purchasing Arrangement.

oneOf.title: Requisition
oneOf.description: The requisition associated with the line item.

requisition.title: Requisition
requisition.description: The requisition associated with the line item.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Requisition.

lineItemNumber.title: Line Item Number
lineItemNumber.description: The line item number associated with the line item.

accountDetails.title: Account Details
accountDetails.description: The account details associated with the line item.

sequenceNumber.title: Sequence Number
sequenceNumber.description: The sequence number associated with the account detail item.

accountingString.title: Accounting String
accountingString.description: The accounting string associated with the line item.

allocation.title: Allocation
allocation.description: The allocation of the line item.

allocated.title: Allocated
allocated.description: The portion (or percentage) of the line item amount or quantity allocated to the accounting string. (One of amount, quantity or percent must be specified)

amount.title: Amount
amount.description: The amount allocated to the accounting string.

quantity.title: Quantity
quantity.description: The quantity allocated to the accounting string.

percentage.title: Percentage
percentage.description: The percentage of the line item amount allocated to the accounting string.

taxAmount.title: Tax Amount
taxAmount.description: The tax amount associated with the accounting string - overrides the distributed line amounts, if specified.

additionalAmount.title: Additional Amount
additionalAmount.description: Additional charges applied to the accounting string (e.g. freight) - overrides the distributed line item amounts, if specified.

discountAmount.title: Discount Amount
discountAmount.description: The discount amount associated with the accounting string - overrides the distributed line amounts, if specified.

budgetCheck.title: Budget Check
budgetCheck.description: An indication that budget checking should be overridden for the accounting string.

submittedBy.title: Submitted By
submittedBy.description: The person who made the submit request for the line item.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Submitted By.

status.title: Status
status.description: The status of the line item.

statusDate.title: Status Date
statusDate.description: The date associated with the line item's status.
